title: Success Stories
description: Small businesses bring innovations to market, enhance competition, and drive technological advancement. Read success stories from across the country.
text:
Every day, small businesses across the U.S. make significant contributions to our mission and to the safety and security of our nation.
With funding through Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) and Small Business Technology Transfer (STTR) programs sponsored by DARPA, these businesses are able to advance core technologies, expand their capabilities, and contribute to the economic well-being of their communities.
